_about: State Administering Agencies (SAAs) for Byrne JAG pass-through. Each state designates an SAA that sub-grants federal DOJ funds to local agencies. Contacts/URLs verified from public DOJ/BJA and state sources; 'verify' flag marks entries where Nucleos should confirm before publishing. Update cadence: manual, as SAA directories change.

AL.name: Alabama
AL.agency: Alabama Department of Economic and Community Affairs (ADECA), Law Enforcement and Traffic Safety Division

AK.name: Alaska
AK.agency: Alaska Department of Public Safety, Council on Domestic Violence and Sexual Assault

AR.agency: Arkansas Department of Finance and Administration, Intergovernmental Services
